name: no-spoiler-cycling
description: Non-Spoiler Cycling v2 MVP - Working session-driven cycling video discovery system

scripts.build:results: node generate-results.js --all && node generate-stage-results.js --all && node generate-rider-season.js --all && node generate-teams.js
scripts.build:all: node generate-page.js && node generate-riders-index.js && node generate-riders-women-index.js && node generate-rider-details.js --all && node generate-rider-details.js --all --gender women && node generate-race-details.js --all && node generate-teams.js
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:quick && npm run build:all && npm run test:smoke && npm run test:results

author: Rob Gruhl
